ground_truth.title: AI Assistants - SmartCat
ground_truth.main_content:
Chatbot AI Assistants

Access Company Knowledge

Chat with your data like you would with a colleague. Get instant answers, insights, and solutions from your company’s collective wisdom through an AI-powered assistant that learns and improves with every interaction.

Invisible. Yet quite visible in reports

The hidden cost of information overload

In today’s fast-paced business environment, valuable time and opportunities are slipping through the cracks.

Too much data. Too much time wasted.

Your teams are drowning in data, spending countless hours searching through folders, documents, and databases – time that could be spent on driving business growth.

Cognitive overload

The problem? 38% of employees report excessive communication volume, while 80% feel overwhelmed by information. This cognitive overload isn’t just frustrating – it’s costing the U.S. economy nearly $1 trillion.

It can be better.

The solution? An AI Assistant that transforms how you access and utilize your company’s knowledge.

You deserve assistance in mundane tasks.

What is an AI assistant?

AI assistants are LLM-based chatbots that have been fine-tuned on your internal knowledge bases, allowing your team to interact with your company’s data through natural conversation.

Instead of manually searching through folders and databases, employees can simply ask questions and receive relevant information as if they were chatting with a knowledgeable colleague.

These assistants serve as an intelligent interface to your company’s collective knowledge, making information retrieval more intuitive and efficient while eliminating the need to learn complex new tools or systems.

50x
faster information retrieval compared to manual search

50%
reduction in time spent searching for information across databases

40%
decrease in process complexity by simplifying information access steps

70%
faster query resolution time with instant knowledge base access

What if you could talk to data?

There’s a better way to work with your knowledge

Choose the perfect assistant for your needs. Select the implementation that best matches your organization’s requirements.

Real-time AI Assistant

Online, connected to LLM and your knowledge base, and fine-tuned. Provides answers with higher accuracy. Demands help from a more senior colleague when in doubt.

- Perfect for businesses with large datasets
- Built-in call for human intervention
- Continuous learning and improvement
- Autonomous

Offline AI Assistant

Connected to an LLM, fine-tuned and based on a predefined database of answers. It will provide answers in every case and require periodic answer quality checks.

- Ideal for regulatory-sensitive industries
- Complete operational autonomy
- Requires periodic quality assurance
- Autonomous

Why should you choose AI Assistants for your internal knowledge?

Efficient search

Find what you need in seconds instead of digging through multiple folders. Your entire knowledge base becomes as accessible as having a conversation.

Continuous improvement

The system learns from interactions and feedback, becoming more accurate and helpful. Each query helps it understand your specific needs better.

Quality assurance

When uncertain, the assistant forwards queries to human operators, ensuring accuracy while maintaining efficiency.

Easy scalability

Upload new documents anytime to expand the knowledge base, keeping your assistant up-to-date with your latest information.

Fine-tuned

The assistant adapts to your company’s terminology, procedures, and communication style for a natural fit with your team.

Seamless workflow

Integrates with your existing tools and systems, requiring minimal changes to your current processes.

Time to make a choice.

Departments that benefit from AI assistants

These chatbots are truly industry-agnostic. Wherever you have the data, it can help you access it faster. Both you and your users.

Marketing
Sales
Customer Support
HR
Account Management
Financial
